Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance

Interface UserTask

All Superinterfaces:
Activity, BaseElement, BpmnModelElementInstance, FlowElement, FlowNode, InteractionNode, ModelElementInstance, Task
All Known Implementing Classes:
UserTaskImpl
public interface UserTask extends Task
The BPMN userTask element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
